description: Explicit composition source for T5 Lux in Umbra. Renderer consumes these events; Python is not the only sheet music source.

section_roles.role: intro/setup: piano/support and low-end establish the room; pluck absent
first pluck tease: sparse motif fragments, not full identity
groove_a delayed pluck identity with sparse piano
groove_b piano answers; pluck reduced to even-bar stabs
post-break low-end/piano re-entry; pluck still absent for negative space
drop_1a earned pluck return at medium density
drop_1b pluck stabs with medium piano
groove_c piano return/foreground; pluck only two sparse answer bars
peak staged pluck build plus fast piano/support
